job_snippets: Design and implement AI/ML models and systems for production environments.
Work with large datasets to train, validate, and deploy machine learning models.
Build and maintain MLOps pipelines for model training, deployment, and monitoring.
Integrate AI capabilities into existing applications and services.
Optimize model performance, accuracy, and computational efficiency.
Collaborate with data scientists and researchers to operationalize ML research.
Implement automated machine learning workflows and hyperparameter tuning.
Deploy models to cloud platforms with proper scaling and monitoring.
Work with deep learning frameworks like TensorFlow, PyTorch, and Keras.
Handle model versioning, A/B testing, and gradual rollout strategies.
Implement computer vision, NLP, or recommendation systems.
Monitor model drift and implement retraining strategies.
Ensure AI systems are ethical, fair, and compliant with regulations.
Optimize inference latency and throughput for real-time applications.
Work with distributed computing frameworks for large-scale ML training.
Implement model explainability and interpretability features.
Handle data preprocessing, feature engineering, and data quality validation.
Collaborate with DevOps teams for CI/CD of ML pipelines.
Stay current with latest AI research and implement cutting-edge techniques.
Document AI system architectures and maintain technical specifications.
